description_long: This object consists of three whole green lemons and one lemon half, all grouped together. The lemons have a smooth, slightly glossy rind with a few minor surface imperfections and a vibrant green color, indicating they are likely unripe. The cut lemon half reveals a pale yellow, juicy interior with visible segments and a moist, fibrous texture. The lemons are plump and oval-shaped, with subtle dimpling and a small protrusion at the blossom end. The surface of the lemons is mostly intact, with no visible cracks or peeling, and the cut surface is clean and fresh. No stickers, labels, or other markings are present on the exterior.
description: A group of three whole green lemons and one cut lemon half, showing a smooth, glossy rind and a juicy, pale yellow interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing two whole green lemons and one lemon half with its juicy, pale yellow interior exposed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded shape of the lemons and the cut surface of the lemon half partially visible in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the three whole lemons, with the cut lemon half mostly obscured.
description_view_3: Back view showing the smooth, green rinds of the three whole lemons with no cut surfaces visible.
attribute_peel_condition: The lemon peel is smooth, mostly intact, with minor dimpling and no visible cracks or peeling.
